content.name: Unassigned Plus
content.author: Chem O`Dun
content.description:
Adds an [b]Unassigned Plus[/b] tab to the [b]Property Owned[/b] menu in the map, placed next to the vanilla Unassigned Ships tab. A dropdown at the top of the tab lets you auto-group unassigned ships into folders by Type, Size, Order, Sector, or any combination of all four - with optional collapsible groups and hierarchical nesting.
[h2][b]Features[/b][/h2] [list] [*] [b]Unassigned Plus tab[/b]: A dedicated tab in the Property Owned menu lists all unassigned ships with the same ship rows as the vanilla view - hull bars, action buttons, and sub-expansion all work exactly as in the vanilla tab. [*] [b]Flexible grouping[/b]: Ships can be grouped by any single dimension or any combination of up to four dimensions: [b]Type[/b] (Purpose), [b]Size[/b], [b]Order[/b], [b]Sector[/b]. All permutations are available in the dropdown. [*] [b]Hierarchical groups[/b]: When multiple grouping dimensions are selected, enable the [b]Hierarchical[/b] checkbox to render groups as a nested tree of headers rather than flat concatenated labels. [*] [b]Collapsible groups[/b]: Enable the [b]Collapsible[/b] checkbox to add +/- toggle buttons to group headers. A master expand/collapse button appears in the section header row. Collapsed state is preserved when re-opening the tab. [*] [b]Group ordering[/b]: Purpose groups follow a logical role order (Fight, Auxiliary, Trade, Mine, Salvage, Build, Other); Size groups are sorted largest-first; Order and Sector groups are sorted alphabetically. [*] [b]Save configuration[/b]: When the [b]Save Tab configuration on change[/b] option is enabled (default: on), the current grouping mode, hierarchical, and collapsible settings are persisted to the save file and restored on the next session. [*] [b]Hide vanilla tab[/b]: Optionally hide the original Unassigned Ships tab to reduce clutter. [*] [b]Tab positioning[/b]: The tab is placed immediately after the vanilla Unassigned Ships tab. [*] [b]Compatible with X4 8.00 and 9.00[/b]. [/list] [h2][b]Requirements[/b][/h2] [list] [*] [b]X4: Foundations[/b]: Version [b]8.00HF4[/b] or higher and [b]UI Extensions and HUD[/b]: Version [b]v8.0.4.x[/b] or higher by [url=https://next.nexusmods.com/profile/kuertee?gameId=2659]kuertee[/url]: [list] [*] Available on Nexus Mods: [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/x4foundations/mods/552]UI Extensions and HUD[/url] [/list] [*] [b]X4: Foundations[/b]: Version [b]9.00 beta 3[/b] or higher and [b]UI Extensions and HUD[/b]: Version [b]v9.0.0.0.3[/b] or higher by [url=https://next.nexusmods.com/profile/kuertee?gameId=2659]kuertee[/url]. [*] [b]Mod Support APIs[/b]: Version 1.95 or higher by [url=https://next.nexusmods.com/profile/sirnukes?gameId=2659]SirNukes[/url]: [list] [*] Available on Steam: [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2042901274]SirNukes Mod Support APIs[/url] [*] Available on Nexus Mods: [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/x4foundations/mods/503]Mod Support APIs[/url]. [/list] [*] [b]Options Helper[/b]: Version 1.0 or higher by [url=https://next.nexusmods.com/profile/ChemODun/mods?gameId=2659]Chem O`Dun[/url]: [list] [*] Available on Steam: [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3715253556]Options Helper[/url] [*] Available on Nexus Mods: [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/x4foundations/mods/2089]Options Helper[/url] [/list] [/list] [h2][b]Installation[/b][/h2] [list] [*] [b]Steam Workshop[/b]: [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3715487702]Unassigned Plus[/url] [*] [b]Nexus Mods[/b]: [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/x4foundations/mods/2090]Unassigned Plus[/url] [/list] [h2][b]Usage[/b][/h2]
Open the map, switch to the [b]Property Owned[/b] panel, and click the [b]Unassigned Plus[/b] tab in the tab strip.
[img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chemodun/X4-UnassignedPlus/refs/heads/main/docs/images/property_owned_unassigned_plus.png[/img]
[h2]Grouping dropdown[/h2]
The first row of the tab contains a [b]Group by:[/b] dropdown.
[img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chemodun/X4-UnassignedPlus/refs/heads/main/docs/images/dropdown.png[/img]
Available options: [list] [*] [b]None[/b] - no grouping; ships listed flat, same as vanilla. [*] [b]Type[/b] - group by ship role: Fight, Trade, Mine, Salvage, Build, Auxiliary, Other. [*] [b]Size[/b] - group by hull class: XL, L, M, S, XS. [*] [b]Order[/b] - group by the ship's current order name. [*] [b]Sector[/b] - group by the ship's current sector. [*] [b]Type, Size[/b] / [b]Size, Type[/b] / ... - multi-dimension grouping; all permutations of up to all four dimensions are available. [/list] [img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chemodun/X4-UnassignedPlus/refs/heads/main/docs/images/grouping.png[/img]
[h2]Hierarchical checkbox[/h2]
Visible when any grouping is active. When checked, multi-dimension groups are rendered as a nested tree: the first dimension forms top-level group headers, each of which contains sub-headers for the second dimension, and so on. When unchecked, the combined label (e.g. "Fight / Small") is used as a single flat header.
[img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chemodun/X4-UnassignedPlus/refs/heads/main/docs/images/hierarchical.png[/img]
[h2]Collapsible checkbox[/h2]
Visible when any grouping is active. When checked, each group header gains a [b]+/-[/b] toggle button. The section header row also gains a master button to expand or collapse all groups at once. Groups start expanded; collapsed state is remembered until the grouping mode changes.
[img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chemodun/X4-UnassignedPlus/refs/heads/main/docs/images/collapsible.png[/img]
[h3][b]Collapse all button[/b][/h3]
When collapsible groups are enabled, a master toggle button appears in the section header row. Clicking it collapses or expands all groups at once.
[img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chemodun/X4-UnassignedPlus/refs/heads/main/docs/images/collapse_all.png[/img]
[h2]Sorting[/h2]
The sorting buttons take effect immediately when on grouped objects, mostly inside a groups. But in addition the sorting by size and sector has also effect on groups itself.
[img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chemodun/X4-UnassignedPlus/refs/heads/main/docs/images/sorting_size.png[/img]
[h2]Extension options[/h2]
[b]Options Menu > Extension options > Unassigned Plus[/b]:
[img]https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chemodun/X4-UnassignedPlus/refs/heads/main/docs/images/options.png[/img] [list] [*] [b]Hide Original Unassigned Ships Tab[/b]: When enabled, the vanilla Unassigned Ships tab is removed from the tab strip. Disabled automatically if the vanilla tab was already hidden by another mod. [*] [b]Save Tab configuration on change[/b]: When enabled (default), the current grouping mode, Hierarchical, and Collapsible settings are saved to the game save whenever they change and restored automatically on the next session. [/list] [h2][b]Credits[/b][/h2] [list] [*] [b]Author[/b]: Chem O`Dun, on [url=https://next.nexusmods.com/profile/ChemODun/mods?gameId=2659]Nexus Mods[/url] and [url=https://steamcommunity.com/id/chemodun/myworkshopfiles/?appid=392160]Steam Workshop[/url] [*] [i]"X4: Foundations"[/i] is a trademark of [url=https://www.egosoft.com]Egosoft[/url]. [/list] [h2][b]Acknowledgements[/b][/h2] [list] [*] [url=https://www.egosoft.com]EGOSOFT[/url] - for the X series. [*] [url=https://next.nexusmods.com/profile/kuertee?gameId=2659]kuertee[/url] - for the [b]UI Extensions and HUD[/b] that makes this extension possible. [*] [url=https://next.nexusmods.com/profile/sirnukes?gameId=2659]SirNukes[/url] - for the [b]Mod Support APIs[/b] that power the UI hooks and options menu. [/list]

text.description: Adds an Unassigned Plus tab to the Property Owned menu in the map, placed next to the vanilla Unassigned Ships tab. A dropdown at the top of the tab lets you auto-group unassigned ships into folders by Purpose, Size, or combinations of both.

Ajoute un onglet Non assigné Plus au menu Propriété sur la carte, placé à côté de l'onglet Vaisseaux non assignés. Un menu déroulant en haut de l'onglet permet de regrouper automatiquement les vaisseaux non assignés en dossiers par Fonction, Taille ou combinaisons des deux.

Añade una pestaña No Asignados Plus al menú de Propiedad en el mapa, junto a la pestaña de Naves no asignadas. Un menú desplegable en la parte superior de la pestaña permite agrupar automáticamente las naves no asignadas en carpetas por Función, Tamaño o combinaciones de ambos.

Aggiunge una scheda Non assegnate Plus al menu Proprietà nella mappa, accanto alla scheda Navi non assegnate. Un menu a tendina nella parte superiore della scheda consente di raggruppare automaticamente le navi non assegnate in cartelle per Scopo, Dimensione o combinazioni di entrambi.

Přidá záložku Nepřidělené Plus do nabídky Vlastnictví na mapě, umístěnou vedle záložky Nepřidělené lodě. Rozbalovací nabídka v horní části záložky umožňuje automatické seskupení nepřidělených lodí do složek podle Účelu, Velikosti nebo jejich kombinace.

Adds an Unassigned Plus tab to the Property Owned menu in the map, placed next to the vanilla Unassigned Ships tab. A dropdown at the top of the tab lets you auto-group unassigned ships into folders by Purpose, Size, or combinations of both.

Dodaje zakładkę Nieprzypisane Plus do menu Własność na mapie, umieszczoną obok zakładki Nieprzypisane statki. Rozwijana lista na górze zakładki umożliwia automatyczne grupowanie nieprzypisanych statków w foldery według Przeznaczenia, Rozmiaru lub kombinacji obu.

Fügt einen Nicht zugewiesene Plus-Tab zum Menü Eigentum auf der Karte hinzu, neben dem Tab für nicht zugewiesene Schiffe. Ein Dropdown am oberen Rand des Tabs ermöglicht die automatische Gruppierung nicht zugewiesener Schiffe in Ordner nach Zweck, Größe oder Kombinationen aus beidem.

Adiciona uma aba Não Atribuídos Plus ao menu de Propriedade no mapa, colocada ao lado da aba de Naves não atribuídas. Um menu suspenso no topo da aba permite agrupar automaticamente as naves não atribuídas em pastas por Propósito, Tamanho ou combinações de ambos.
マップの所有物メニューに未割り当てプラスタブを追加し、未割り当て艦船タブの隣に配置します。タブ上部のドロップダウンで、未割り当て艦船を目的、サイズ、またはその組み合わせでフォルダに自動グループ化できます。
맵의 소유 메뉴에 미배정 플러스 탭을 추가하며, 미배정 함선 탭 옆에 배치됩니다. 탭 상단의 드롭다운을 통해 미배정 함선을 목적, 크기 또는 이 둘의 조합으로 폴더에 자동 그룹화할 수 있습니다.
在地图的财产菜单中添加「未分配增强」标签页，位于未分配舰船标签页旁边。标签页顶部的下拉菜单可按用途、尺寸或两者的组合将未分配的舰船自动分组到文件夹中。
在地圖的財產選單中新增「未分配增強」標籤頁，位於未分配艦船標籤頁旁邊。標籤頁頂部的下拉選單可按用途、尺寸或兩者的組合將未分配的艦船自動分組到資料夾中。

Haritadaki Mülk menüsüne Atanmamış Artı sekmesi ekler; Atanmamış Gemiler sekmesinin yanına yerleştirilir. Sekmenin üst kısmındaki açılır menü, atanmamış gemileri Amaç, Boyut veya ikisinin kombinasyonuna göre klasörlerde otomatik olarak gruplamanızı sağlar.

Додає вкладку Непризначені Плюс до меню Власність на карті, поруч зі вкладкою Непризначені кораблі. Випадаючий список у верхній частині вкладки дозволяє автоматично групувати непризначені кораблі у папки за Призначенням, Розміром або їх комбінацією.
